RS 9:315.19
Schedule for support
https://www.legis.la.gov/legis/Law.aspx?d=107384

§315.19.  Schedule for support
The schedule of support to be used for determining the basic child support obligation
is as follows:
LOUISIANA CHILD SUPPORT GUIDELINE
SCHEDULE OF BASIC CHILD SUPPORT OBLIGATIONS
COMBINED
ADJUSTED
ONE
TWO
THREE
FOUR
FIVE
SIX
